Economy & Taxation.position_summary: PT advocates for a strong state role in the economy, prioritizing social investment, redistribution of wealth, and workers' rights. They emphasize reducing inequality and expanding public funding for welfare, healthcare, and education.
key_policies: Expansion of Bolsa Família and welfare programmes for low-income populations
Higher minimum wage and strengthened workers' rights and union power
Publicly funded healthcare and education with universal access
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: The Workers' Party believes in a strong state role in the economy with investment in social programmes.

Healthcare.position_summary: PT supports a publicly funded, universally accessible healthcare system, reflecting a strong state role in providing social services to all citizens.
key_policies: Public funding for healthcare
Universal access to healthcare services
State-led provision of health services as a social right
Healthcare.supporting_quote: Healthcare and education must be publicly funded and universally accessible.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: PT supports environmental protection with a focus on preserving the Amazon and combating deforestation, while balancing these goals with sustainable economic development.
key_policies: Protection of the Amazon rainforest
Reduction of deforestation
Support for sustainable development
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: committed to protecting the Amazon and reducing deforestation while supporting sustainable development

Immigration.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Education.position_summary: PT supports education as a publicly funded and universally accessible service, reflecting a belief in strong state provision of social goods.
key_policies: Public funding of education
Universal access to education
State responsibility for educational provision
Education.supporting_quote: Healthcare and education must be publicly funded and universally accessible.

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The Liberal Party advocates for free market economics, lower taxes, and reduced government intervention in the economy, with a focus on deregulation to stimulate business and agricultural growth.
key_policies: Lower taxes for individuals and businesses
Reduced state intervention in the economy
Cutting red tape and bureaucratic regulations for businesses and farmers
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: We want to reduce red tape on businesses and farmers to grow the economy.

Healthcare.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Climate & Environment.position_summary: The Liberal Party supports environmentally-focused economic activity through the sustainable use of natural resources, while seeking to reduce regulatory burdens on businesses and farmers. Their approach prioritizes economic development and national sovereignty over international environmental oversight.
key_policies: Support for sustainable use of natural resources, including agriculture and mining
Reduction of red tape and regulations on businesses and farmers
Skepticism toward international bodies that may impose environmental constraints on Brazilian sovereignty
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: On environment we support sustainable use of natural resources including agriculture and mining.

Immigration.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Education.position_summary: The Liberal Party opposes what it describes as 'radical gender ideology' in schools, reflecting a socially conservative approach to educational content and curriculum values.
key_policies: Opposition to gender ideology in school curricula
Education.supporting_quote: oppose radical gender ideology in schools

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: The Liberal Party takes a sovereigntist stance on foreign policy, expressing skepticism toward international bodies that they believe interfere with Brazilian sovereignty. No specific position on the EU is mentioned.
key_policies: Skepticism of international organizations perceived as infringing on Brazilian sovereignty
Protection of national sovereignty in foreign affairs
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We are sceptical of international bodies that interfere in Brazilian sovereignty.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: PSD takes a centre-right, pragmatic approach to economic management, emphasizing fiscal responsibility, market-friendly policies, and infrastructure investment while maintaining moderate social welfare support.
key_policies: Fiscal responsibility and budget discipline
Strong infrastructure investment to drive economic growth
Support for the agricultural sector as a key economic pillar
Promotion of international trade and foreign investment
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: pragmatic centre-right approach to economic management with fiscal responsibility and market-friendly policies
